user_input: 小样本行业文本意图识别
clarification_questions: 每个意图大约有多少标注样本？
是否需要识别训练集中没有出现的新意图或拒识样本？

baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A pretrained sentence encoder with linear/prototypical baseline.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: improve class separation with few examples
use intent definitions as side information

hypothesis: With few labeled examples, unstable class boundaries cause confusion among semantically adjacent intents; contrastive/prototype training with label semantics should improve macro-F1 while preserving open-set calibration.

alternatives: data augmentation as a separate baseline
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Freeze a sentence encoder baseline, test contrastive adaptation, then add label-description prototypes only if descriptions are informative and available at inference.
reject: using test utterances in prompt examples
claiming open-set performance without unknown-intent data

experiment_plan: macro-F1 plus open-set AUROC if applicable
stop_conditions: Stop if gains vanish across seeds.
Revise if label descriptions leak target examples.
No-go for general few-shot claim from one fixed split.

required: distinguish verified, inferred, proposed, and unknown statements
verify supplied-paper identity and role before using it
reject irrelevant retrieval results even when DOI or metadata is valid
bind every core paper to a specific gap, module, comparison, or risk role
produce a minimal pilot before a full combined method
forbidden: fabricate paper identifiers, results, code availability, or reproduced metrics
treat keyword overlap as sufficient evidence
force supplied papers to be compatible
claim novelty from A+B+C composition alone
hide stronger baselines, failed modules, or negative results

user_input: 企业知识库问答中的检索增强生成
clarification_questions: 知识库主要是规章文档、技术文档，还是工单/聊天记录？
当证据不足时，系统是否必须拒答并给出引用？

baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A transparent BM25 and dense-retrieval baseline with citation-preserving generation.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: improve top-context precision and grounded answers

hypothesis: Enterprise queries mix exact identifiers and semantic descriptions; hybrid retrieval plus reranking should improve evidence recall/precision, while claim-level citation and abstention reduce unsupported answers.

tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Start with BM25, dense, and hybrid retrieval comparison; add a reranker only after retrieval-error analysis, then enforce claim-evidence binding and abstention.

stop_conditions: No-go if ACL leakage is possible.
Stop adding generator complexity while retrieval recall is inadequate.
Revise if evaluation lacks unanswerable questions.

user_input: 减少大语言模型在专业问答中的幻觉
clarification_questions: 专业领域是什么，是否有可追溯的权威资料库？
更不能接受错误回答，还是更不能接受过度拒答？

baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A closed-book and basic RAG baseline evaluated on answerable and unanswerable questions.

candidate_families: query rewriting and evidence quality checks

hypothesis: Unsupported professional answers arise from missing or contradictory evidence; evidence-quality gating and claim-level verification should reduce unsupported claim rate while keeping abstention within the chosen utility guardrail.

alternatives: structured templates and deterministic calculators for narrow subdomains
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Separate retrieval failure, reasoning failure, and citation failure; add evidence-quality gating first, then claim verification, rather than stacking multiple self-reflection prompts.
reject: using model self-confidence as the only verifier

experiment_plan: unsupported claim rate, factuality, citation precision, abstention utility, latency/cost
stop_conditions: No-go for high-stakes deployment without domain expert review.
Stop if verifier repeats generator errors without independent evidence.
Revise if benchmark lacks adversarial false-premise questions.

user_input: 基于图神经网络的欺诈交易检测
clarification_questions: 图中的节点和边分别是什么，例如账户、商户和交易吗？
需要离线批量检测，还是在线实时拦截？

candidate_families: heterogeneous GNN if typed graph is real
baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A non-graph tabular baseline plus a simple GCN/GAT/GraphSAGE baseline.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: avoid treating future and past edges identically

hypothesis: Fraud patterns depend on typed and time-ordered neighborhoods; heterogeneous or temporal aggregation should improve minority recall beyond strong tabular and static-graph baselines without temporal leakage.

alternatives: subgraph anomaly detection for new fraud rings
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Prove graph value against tabular features first; add either heterogeneity or temporal modeling based on error analysis, not both immediately.
reject: transductive node access presented as online detection

experiment_plan: PR-AUC, recall at fixed false-positive rate, calibration, latency
stop_conditions: No-go if future edges leak into training.
Stop if graph features do not outperform strong tabular features.
Revise if labels arrive after the intended intervention window.

user_input: 面向电商场景的多行为推荐系统
clarification_questions: 有哪些行为，例如浏览、收藏、加购和购买？最终优化目标是哪一个？
更关注下一步行为序列，还是用户—商品多关系图？

candidate_families: multi-relational graph or cascading behavior model
baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A strong single-target collaborative filtering baseline plus a simple multi-behavior model.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: use weak behaviors without overwhelming purchase signal
align useful behavior views while preserving differences

hypothesis: Auxiliary behaviors provide dense but noisy preference signals; gated behavior transfer should improve purchase ranking, while contrastive alignment is useful only if behavior views are semantically consistent.

tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Establish target-only and naive multi-behavior baselines; add gated transfer first, then contrastive regularization only after measuring behavior consistency.
reject: random split that leaks future purchase intent

experiment_plan: Recall/NDCG on target behavior plus coverage and cold-start slices
stop_conditions: Stop if auxiliary behavior hurts target-only baseline.
Revise if contrastive positives are not behavior-consistent.
